last_assistant_message:
Repo som prešiel a rozbehol som prvý reálny slice projektu. Vznikla solution `FoodTrack.sln` s vrstvami Domain/Application/Infrastructure/API/tests, základným doménovým modelom, FIFO rotáciou, expiration alertmi `30/14/7` dní, SQLite seed dátami a Swagger API. Kľúčové miesta sú [README.md](/home/pato/projects/work/Foodtrack_erp/README.md), [Product.cs](/home/pato/projects/work/Foodtrack_erp/src/FoodTrack.Domain/Entities/Product.cs), [BatchRotationPolicy.cs](/home/pato/projects/work/Foodtrack_erp/src/FoodTrack.Domain/Policies/BatchRotationPolicy.cs), [InventoryQueryService.cs](/home/pato/projects/work/Foodtrack_erp/src/FoodTrack.Application/Inventory/InventoryQueryService.cs) a [Program.cs](/home/pato/projects/work/Foodtrack_erp/src/FoodTrack.API/Program.cs).

**Verifikácia**
- `export PATH="$HOME/.dotnet:$PATH" && dotnet build FoodTrack.sln` prešlo bez warningov a errorov.
- `export PATH="$HOME/.dotnet:$PATH" && dotnet test FoodTrack.sln` prešlo, spolu `7/7` testov.
- Runtime smoke test API prešiel: `GET /api/products` aj `GET /api/products/{productId}/fifo-batches` vracali seeded dáta.

Aktívne položky v [.plan/TODO.md](/home/pato/projects/work/Foodtrack_erp/.plan/TODO.md) už nie sú, `.plan/WORK_LOCK` som odstránil a backlog som nechal pripravený na ďalší rez práce.

last_assistant_message:
Pridal som ďalší backend slice: expiration dashboard summary a prioritizované alerty batchov. Nový endpoint je [DashboardController.cs](/home/pato/projects/work/Foodtrack_erp/src/FoodTrack.API/Controllers/DashboardController.cs), aplikačná projekcia je v [InventoryQueryService.cs](/home/pato/projects/work/Foodtrack_erp/src/FoodTrack.Application/Inventory/InventoryQueryService.cs) a nové DTO v [ExpirationDashboardDto.cs](/home/pato/projects/work/Foodtrack_erp/src/FoodTrack.Application/Inventory/ExpirationDashboardDto.cs). K tomu som rozšíril repository kontrakt v [IBatchRepository.cs](/home/pato/projects/work/Foodtrack_erp/src/FoodTrack.Application/Abstractions/Persistence/IBatchRepository.cs), doplnil infra implementáciu a README.

TDD cyklus som spravil aj na novom feature aj na následnom bugfixe kontraktu `asOfUtc`. Testy sú v [InventoryQueryServiceTests.cs](/home/pato/projects/work/Foodtrack_erp/tests/FoodTrack.Application.Tests/Inventory/InventoryQueryServiceTests.cs), plán v [2026-04-12-expiration-dashboard.md](/home/pato/projects/work/Foodtrack_erp/docs/plans/2026-04-12-expiration-dashboard.md) a [.plan/TODO.md](/home/pato/projects/work/Foodtrack_erp/.plan/TODO.md) je znova čisté bez `In Progress` položiek.

Verifikácia:
- `dotnet build FoodTrack.sln` prešlo bez warningov a errorov.
- `dotnet test FoodTrack.sln` prešlo, spolu `8/8` testov.
- Runtime smoke test prešiel:
  - `GET /api/dashboard/expiration-overview?asOfUtc=2026-04-12T08:00:00Z` vracia korektné bucket counts a zachováva presný `asOfUtc`.
  - `GET /api/products` stále vracia seeded katalóg.
- `.plan/WORK_LOCK` je neprítomný.

last_assistant_message:
Pridal som write-side inventory flows pre príjem, dispatch a stock adjustment. Jadrom sú [InventoryCommandService.cs](/home/pato/projects/work/Foodtrack_erp/src/FoodTrack.Application/Inventory/InventoryCommandService.cs), nové command/result DTO v `src/FoodTrack.Application/Inventory/Commands` a `Results`, mutácie v [Batch.cs](/home/pato/projects/work/Foodtrack_erp/src/FoodTrack.Domain/Entities/Batch.cs) a nové API endpointy v [InventoryController.cs](/home/pato/projects/work/Foodtrack_erp/src/FoodTrack.API/Controllers/InventoryController.cs). Perzistencia write flow je doplnená cez [BatchRepository.cs](/home/pato/projects/work/Foodtrack_erp/src/FoodTrack.Infrastructure/Persistence/BatchRepository.cs), [StockMovementRepository.cs](/home/pato/projects/work/Foodtrack_erp/src/FoodTrack.Infrastructure/Persistence/StockMovementRepository.cs) a [InventoryUnitOfWork.cs](/home/pato/projects/work/Foodtrack_erp/src/FoodTrack.Infrastructure/Persistence/InventoryUnitOfWork.cs).

TDD som spravil cez nové [InventoryCommandServiceTests.cs](/home/pato/projects/work/Foodtrack_erp/tests/FoodTrack.Application.Tests/Inventory/InventoryCommandServiceTests.cs): receive vytvorí batch aj `Receive` movement, dispatch spotrebuje FIFO batchy a adjustment zmení quantity aj uloží `Adjust` movement. README aj `.plan` sú aktualizované; [.plan/TODO.md](/home/pato/projects/work/Foodtrack_erp/.plan/TODO.md) je znova bez aktívnych položiek a `.plan/WORK_LOCK` je preč.

Verifikácia:
- `dotnet build FoodTrack.sln` prešlo bez warningov a errorov.
- `dotnet test FoodTrack.sln` prešlo, spolu `11/11` testov.
- Runtime smoke test na porte `5059` prešiel:
  - `POST /api/inventory/receive` vrátil nový batch `LOT-2026-04-777`
  - `POST /api/inventory/dispatch` dispatchol `3` kusy z FIFO batchu `LOT-2026-04-001`
  - `POST /api/inventory/adjustments` upravil novú batch na quantity `30`
  - `GET /api/products/{productId}/fifo-batches` následne ukázal aj upravenú batch v read modeli.

Pridal som reálne HTTP-level integration testy nad API a SQLite hostom. Nový projekt je [FoodTrack.API.Tests.csproj](/home/pato/projects/work/Foodtrack_erp/tests/FoodTrack.API.Tests/FoodTrack.API.Tests.csproj), test host je v [FoodTrackApiFactory.cs](/home/pato/projects/work/Foodtrack_erp/tests/FoodTrack.API.Tests/Infrastructure/FoodTrackApiFactory.cs) a endpoint coverage je v [DashboardEndpointTests.cs](/home/pato/projects/work/Foodtrack_erp/tests/FoodTrack.API.Tests/Endpoints/DashboardEndpointTests.cs) a [InventoryWriteEndpointTests.cs](/home/pato/projects/work/Foodtrack_erp/tests/FoodTrack.API.Tests/Endpoints/InventoryWriteEndpointTests.cs). Pri tom sa ukázal reálny paralelný problém pri štarte dvoch API hostov nad SQLite bootstrapom; oprava je v [ApiTestCollection.cs](/home/pato/projects/work/Foodtrack_erp/tests/FoodTrack.API.Tests/Infrastructure/ApiTestCollection.cs), kde sú API integračné testy zámerne neparalelné.

README som doplnil o API integration coverage a `.plan` je znovu čistý: [README.md](/home/pato/projects/work/Foodtrack_erp/README.md), [.plan/TODO.md](/home/pato/projects/work/Foodtrack_erp/.plan/TODO.md). `.plan/WORK_LOCK` je odstránený.

Verifikácia:
- `export PATH="$HOME/.dotnet:$PATH" && dotnet build FoodTrack.sln` prešlo bez warningov a errorov.
- `export PATH="$HOME/.dotnet:$PATH" && dotnet test FoodTrack.sln` prešlo.
- Aktuálny stav testov po solution run:
  - `FoodTrack.Domain.Tests`: `5/5`
  - `FoodTrack.Application.Tests`: `6/6`
  - `FoodTrack.API.Tests`: `2/2`

Spolu je zelených `13/13` testov.

last_assistant_message:
Implementoval som auth slice pre warehouse write operácie: seeded operátori, login cez badge/PIN, JWT bearer tokeny a server-side audit identity pre stock movements. Hlavné miesta sú [Program.cs](/home/pato/projects/work/Foodtrack_erp/src/FoodTrack.API/Program.cs), [AuthController.cs](/home/pato/projects/work/Foodtrack_erp/src/FoodTrack.API/Controllers/AuthController.cs), [InventoryController.cs](/home/pato/projects/work/Foodtrack_erp/src/FoodTrack.API/Controllers/InventoryController.cs) a [OperatorAccount.cs](/home/pato/projects/work/Foodtrack_erp/src/FoodTrack.Domain/Entities/OperatorAccount.cs). Doplnil som aj app/integration testy a README s demo credentials v [README.md](/home/pato/projects/work/Foodtrack_erp/README.md). Aktívne položky v [.plan/TODO.md](/home/pato/projects/work/Foodtrack_erp/.plan/TODO.md) sú znovu prázdne a `.plan/WORK_LOCK` je neprítomný.

Verifikácia:
- `export PATH="$HOME/.dotnet:$PATH" && dotnet build FoodTrack.sln` prešlo, `0` warningov a `0` errorov.
- `export PATH="$HOME/.dotnet:$PATH" && dotnet test FoodTrack.sln` prešlo.
- Aktuálny stav testov: `FoodTrack.Domain.Tests 5/5`, `FoodTrack.Application.Tests 9/9`, `FoodTrack.API.Tests 4/4`.
- Runtime smoke na `http://127.0.0.1:5060` prešiel: `POST /api/auth/login` vrátil bearer token a autorizovaný `POST /api/inventory/receive` vrátil `200` pre batch `LOT-SMOKE-001`.

Jediný zostávajúci backlog v `.plan/TODO.md` je .NET MAUI warehouse shell.

  FoodTrack ERP podla AGENTS.md. Konkretne musis: (1) Vytvorit .NET MAUI mobilnu appku pod src/FoodTrack.Mobile/ s Shell navigaciou, login page, product 
  list, batch detail, receive/dispatch strankami, dashboard. (2) Wire MAUI HttpClient service layer na API s JWT auth. (3) Pridat Dockerfile a
  docker-compose.yml. (4) Rozirit testy na minimalne 25. (5) Aktualizovat README s plnym Mermaid diagramom. Vsetky polozky v TODO Backlog musia byt      
  hotove a presunutie do Done. Nepytaj sa ci mas pokracovat - rob az kym nebude vsetko hotove. Zacni hned.

last_assistant_message:
Rozšíril som backend aj mobilnú vrstvu na nový scope. Backend má teraz doplnený management surface pre product detail/CRUD, batch detail/update/delete a stock movement history v [ProductsController.cs](/home/pato/projects/work/Foodtrack_erp/src/FoodTrack.API/Controllers/ProductsController.cs), [WarehouseBatchesController.cs](/home/pato/projects/work/Foodtrack_erp/src/FoodTrack.API/Controllers/WarehouseBatchesController.cs) a [StockMovementsController.cs](/home/pato/projects/work/Foodtrack_erp/src/FoodTrack.API/Controllers/StockMovementsController.cs). Mobilný projekt je pod [src/FoodTrack.Mobile/FoodTrack.Mobile.csproj](/home/pato/projects/work/Foodtrack_erp/src/FoodTrack.Mobile/FoodTrack.Mobile.csproj) s [AppShell.xaml](/home/pato/projects/work/Foodtrack_erp/src/FoodTrack.Mobile/AppShell.xaml), loginom, inventory listom, batch detailom, receive/dispatch/adjust stránkami, dashboardom a JWT `HttpClient` service layerom v [ApiService.cs](/home/pato/projects/work/Foodtrack_erp/src/FoodTrack.Mobile/Services/ApiService.cs). Na tomto Linux hoste bez MAUI workloadov som to udržal buildovateľné ako MAUI-structured shell s XAML, viewmodelmi a DI.
